name: 4Me Team Official Source
subtitle: An intuitive personal space for digital organization. Made for your workflow.
description: 4Me (Useful Web Browser & File Manager) and efficiency utilities.

apps.name: 4Me
apps.subtitle: Intuitive thumb-friendly browser and local asset manager.
apps.localizedDescription:
4Me is a high-productivity one-handed iOS browser and professional file manager built from the ground up for seamless asset management and optimized reading comfort.

Features:
• Advanced One-Handed UI — Gestures and critical navigation bar consolidated at the bottom to prevent accidental drops.
• Contrast Booster & Comfort tools — Display Dimmer Overlay reduces screen brightness beyond standard system limits for reading in low-light environments.
• Pro-Grade Local File Explorer — Browse and audit your local documents, images, and digital creative assets in a highly fluid list/grid layout.
• Smart Sorting & Metadata — Dynamic categorization by size, name, and custom timestamps to keep your local storage perfectly cataloged.
• Intrusive Content Filter — Experience a clean, lightning-fast web by eliminating disruptive layout elements and intrusive tracking scripts.
• Content Tab Groups — Easily segment your active browsing and reading sessions by research topics.
• Secure Vault — Protect your private folders with optional biometric authentication (Face ID / Touch ID).

versions.localizedDescription:
Performance & Battery Optimization

This update is focused entirely on making the browser lighter, cooler, and easier on your device battery.
- Major CPU usage reduction. Resolved an issue where background web viewer operations kept the CPU running at a high load, causing noticeable device heating. Idle and general browsing CPU usage is now stable.
- Cooler device, longer battery life. With processing optimized in the background, the device stays much cooler during extended reading sessions.
- Smoother UI feedback. Eliminated unnecessary redraws across the address bar and core views for an enhanced thumb-friendly interaction.
- Lighter viewport resources. Enhanced tab initialization to free up hidden framework memory allocations instantly.

1. Performance & Stability Optimizations
- CPU Usage Reduction: Optimized core web routines to significantly lower background overhead.
- Thumbnail Generation & Thread Fixes: Resolved the layout rendering deadlock in ContentGrid and stabilized image pre-caching routines on the main thread.
- Thermal Runway Prevention: Fixed a rendering loop in the asset explorer that triggered high resource allocation and device warmth.
- Continuous Audio Viewport: Web-audio framework will no longer halt when switching active workspace tabs.

2. New Features & Content Control
- Redirect Prevention: Added a navigation lock toggle next to the Content Filter. When turned ON, automated cross-domain page redirects are safely blocked with a manual confirmation layout.
- Workspace End Action: Added a PlaybackEndAction interface to the asset viewer, allowing users to configure continuous media behavior (Next / Stop / Loop).
- Dynamic Workspace Hiding: Added the ability to catalog and hide specific asset folders using biometric credentials.

3. Interface, Formatting & Engineering Comfort
- Display Dimmer Control: Integrated an ultra-low brightness overlay to prevent optical fatigue in pitch-black environments.
- Content Filter Enhancements: Streamlined native filter tables to drastically minimize initial asset parsing latency.
- Haptic Operation Feedback: Fine-tuned sensory tactical response when modifying standard viewport layout variables.

news.caption: 4Me 1.1 Update Released!
news.title: 4Me 1.1 Update Released!
news.content: We are excited to announce the release of 4Me version 1.1! This update includes significant performance optimizations, enhanced one-handed UI responsiveness, dynamic content filtration, and comprehensive local asset utility tools. We highly recommend updating for the best low-light reading experience. Thank you for your continued support!
